sections.paragraph:
τημελοῦχος, ον (cp. τημέλεια ‘care, attention’, ἔχω; for-οῦχος formations s. Buck, Reverse Index 687f) pert. to providing care, care-taking, fostering τημελοῦχος ἄγγελος a guardian angel ApcPt, Fgm. 1 and 2 (fr. Clem. Alex., Ecl. Proph. 41, 1; 48, 1 Stählin).—DELG s.v. τημελέω.

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Buck, Reverse Index Buck, Reverse Index = Reverse Index of Greek Nouns and Adjectives

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

ApcPt ApcPt = Apocalypse of Peter—List 1

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

  1. fr. = from

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1002
